productDisplayName: John Players Men Stripes Black Shirt
description: Style Note Giving the classy and traditional look a contemporary twist, this black shirt comes from the Heritage Times collection of john players and is an essential part of every man's updated wardrobe. Pair this one with a light trouser for a semi formal or casual look. Product Details Black shirt with solid black and dotted white vertical stripes, has a spread collar, a full buttoned down placket, short sleeves and a patch pocket on the left chest with sharp angular corners Material and Care Feather cotton Machine wash cold using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry low or dry flat in shade inside out Use warm iron Size and Fit John Players' contemporary fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size 40
